hero.subtitle: Video editor, motion designer & graphic designer based in Haifa.

paragraphs: I studied Visual Communication at Bezalel Academy of Arts and Design (2017–2021).
I'm passionate about storytelling through video editing, motion design, graphic design, image-making, and film. I love bringing ideas to life with bold visuals and thoughtful movement.

sections.label: Ads
sections.title: Performance Video Ads
sections.description: Here's a selection of ads I've created over the years. I love blending motion, visuals, and just the right amount of marketing magic to tell stories that grab attention and get real results.

sections.label: Bezalel
sections.title: Bezalel Academy of Arts and Design
sections.description: Selected works from my B.Des in Visual Communication — film, motion, graphic design, illustration, photography and more. 2017–2021.

sections.label: Personal
sections.title: Personal Work
sections.description: Just some things I made for fun — exploring motion, design, and whatever caught my curiosity.

sections.label: Photography
sections.title: Photography
sections.description: A collection of pictures taken over the years — film and digital.

ads.title: Ads
ads.description: Here's a selection of ads I've created over the years. As a video editor and marketing designer, I love blending motion, visuals, and just the right amount of marketing magic to tell stories that grab attention and get real results.

bezalel.title: Bezalel
bezalel.description: Selected works from my B.Des in Visual Communication at Bezalel Academy of Arts and Design — film, motion, graphic design, illustration, photography and more. 2017–2021.

projects.title: Out of Sight — Final Project
projects.description: My final project at Bezalel. Animated clip about our dreams — frame by frame technique. The clip emphasizes the stream of consciousness and the irrational randomness we experience in dreams. Based on real dreams.

projects.title: Asgardia
projects.description: Asgardia — a city in the sky. A branding campaign for a micronation event celebrating the relocation to space. What will you take to space? Includes motion, invitation print and flying tickets.

projects.title: A Perfect Day for Banana Fish
projects.description: Title sequence design inspired by J.D. Salinger's short story. Typography, motion and atmosphere.

projects.title: Hitchcock Drive-in Index
projects.description: A curated index of Alfred Hitchcock's films — editorial layout and graphic design.

projects.title: Disney Villains Card Game
projects.description: A full set of illustrated cards featuring Disney villains, designed as a playable card game.

projects.title: MGMT Posters
projects.description: Poster design series inspired by the band MGMT.

projects.title: Alfred Hitchcock Booklet
projects.description: A designed booklet exploring the visual language of Alfred Hitchcock's films.

projects.title: Indira Gandhi Booklet
projects.description: A typographic and photographic booklet about the life of Indira Gandhi.

projects.title: Illustrated Movie Posters
projects.description: A series of illustrated posters reimagining classic films.

projects.title: Psychedelic Zoo
projects.description: Animals reimagined through a psychedelic lens — a series of illustrations.

projects.title: GIFs
projects.description: A collection of animated GIFs made during my studies at Bezalel.

personal.title: Personal
personal.description: Things I made for myself — no deadlines, no approvals. Just creative curiosity and late-night ideas.

projects.title: Mix
projects.description: These are things I made for myself — No deadlines, no approvals — just me, some creative curiosity, and a few late-night ideas that turned into something cool.

photography.title: Photography
photography.description: One of my passions is photography. A collection of pictures taken over the years — some are film photography.
